case_title: FLYNN, GREGORY GRANT VS GILBERT A. FITCH& ASSOCIATES, INC.

docket_entries.description: EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED DEC-01-2007 ORDERED DESTROYED
NOTICE OF MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT MAILED TO ALL PARTIES.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAY-25-2007, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JUN-28-2007 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 VENUE CHALLENGE DENIED.
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FLYNN, GREGORY GRANT HEARING SET FOR SEP-10-2007 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DEFT'S CONTC ORDER REQUEST FILED; $10 FEE PAID; TO: FOLDER/TRAY.
OPPOSITION TO DEFENDANT'S VENUE CHALLENGE FILED BY PLAINTIFF GREG FLYNN.
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT CONTINUED FROM SEP-10-2007 TO SEP-24-2007 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FLYNN, GREGORY GRANT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GILBERT A. FITCH& ASSOCIATES, INC. $875.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $875.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,200.00 FILED BY FLYNN, GREGORY GRANT AS TO DEFENDANT GILBERT A. FITCH& ASSOCIATES, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-25-2007 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT GILBERT A. FITCH& ASSOCIATES, INC. PLAINTIFF DID NOT APPEAR AFTER PREVAILING ON VENUE CHALLENGE, DEFENDANT AND WITNESS AND EVIDENCE CAME ALL THE WAY FROM CONCORD FOR HEARING STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
VIA-MAIL, PLTF'S REQUEST FOR MOTION TO VACATE. RETURNED TO PARTY DUE TO FAILED TO SUBMIT $20 FILING FEE, W/REJECTION LETTER SENT TO PLTF.
VIA-MAIL PLTF'S REQUEST FOR MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT RECV'D & FILED W/REQUIRED FEE OF $20.
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF SEP-24-2007, GRANTED
